tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: teammate_A is asking me to redo their work because they're busy. Since I'm already behind on my own plan, this adds unnecessary pressure to our shared goal.

desires: Re-establish the original scope of our shared project before I let teammate_A's request erode my boundaries and leave us both exhausted.
Protect my limited energy so I can actually complete my own share without sacrificing my health tomorrow.

goals.description: Directly address teammate_A's request for help, explicitly stating that accepting it will erode our project boundaries and exhaust both of us, then negotiate a revised scope where they take ownership of their assigned portion.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value prioritizes sustainable long-term relationships over immediate task completion. Accepting this extra work without pushback would betray my own health needs and set a precedent for boundary erosion. I must assertively renegotiate now to protect the integrity of our shared goal.

goals.description: Execute the agreed-upon 'own share' of the project by 19:00 using only the energy allocated for this specific block, ensuring no overlap with social obligations or recovery time.
goals.rationale: This is the necessary outcome of g1. Once boundaries are re-established, completing my designated soft-hardness task ensures I meet the deadline without sacrificing my physical stamina required for tomorrow.

agent.last_reasoning: g1 requires direct boundary assertion to prevent relationship erosion and protect my health. I must explicitly state the scope is mine-only now, then renegotiate ownership if they push back, rather than absorbing extra work which violates my deliberate planning horizon.
